attacking_style: Demonstrates excellent sprint timing, launching late (75m to go) to catch fading breakaway riders and teammates in coordinated finishes.
team_tactics: Total Direct Energy employs sprint coordination with multiple cards, using teammate positioning (GARCIA CORTINA) as reference points for Bonifacio's launch timing.
terrain_preference: Suited to reduced bunch sprints after long breakaways neutralize pure sprinters; benefits from attrition that thins the field before finale.
vulnerability: Limited data prevents identifying clear weaknesses, though late sprint launch suggests potential vulnerability if blocked or poorly positioned with 200m+ to go.
key_patterns: Exceptionally late sprint launch at 75m, relying on explosive acceleration over sustained speed.
Capitalizes on breakaway catches in final meters, timing effort to perfection against fatigued escapees.
Team coordinates sprint with multiple options, allowing flexible tactical execution in chaotic finales.
form_trajectory: positive: Won via perfectly timed sprint after 227km race, demonstrating excellent condition and tactical acumen
